title: UPSC Editorial Analysis: The Iran Crisis and the Indo-Pacific
description: General Studies-2; Effect of policies and politics of developed and developing countries on India’s interests, Indian diaspora.   Introduction: In the modern era, geography no longer confines conflict. The traditional view of “West Asia” and the “Indo-Pacific” as separate silos is crumbling.
